Fields: [ID Name Email]
AllFields: [ID Name Email pwd]
Fields[*User]: [ID Name Email]
TypeName[User]: User
TypeName[*User]: User
TypeName[Color]: Color
Tag[User](ID,json): id
Tag[User](ID,db): user_id
Tag[User](Name,json): name,omitempty
Tag[User](Name,db): full_name
Tag[User](Email,json): email
Tag[User](Email,db): ""
query: SELECT user_id,full_name FROM users
len(Fields)=3
